{"files":[{"path":"parser.py","contents":"def parse_string(input_string):
    # Replace single quotes with escaped single quotes
    input_string = input_string.replace("'", "\\'")
    # Replace double quotes with escaped double quotes
    input_string = input_string.replace('"', '\\"')
    # Replace newlines with escaped newlines
    input_string = input_string.replace('\n', '\\n')
    return input_string

{"files":[{"path":"Makefile","contents":"# Makefile for building the project

CC = gcc
CFLAGS = -Wall -g

# Source files
SRC = main.c utils.c

# Object files
OBJ = $(SRC:.c=.o)

# Target executable
TARGET = my_program

all: $(TARGET)

$(TARGET): $(OBJ)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ $^

%.o: %.c
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $<

clean:
	rm -f $(OBJ) $(TARGET)

.PHONY: all clean
"}],"summary":"Normalized whitespace in Makefile using tabs and spaces correctly.","done":true}
